name: Demeter
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Demeter grain-mother — sorrow turned to harvest by returning steps.
flowText: Demeter grain-mother — sorrow turned to harvest by returning steps.

related.name: Centeotl
related.teaser: Centeotl golden maize-lord — sweetness lifted from soil to song.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Ceres
related.teaser: Ceres embodies earth, grain, abundance — under Saturn · Venus; in Taurus, Virgo.

related.name: ♍ Virgo
related.teaser: Virgo is the wheat of Earth — patient harvester, discerning servant, keeper of order.

related.name: Brigid
related.teaser: Brigid is a bedrock of becoming — Hearth; under Sun; in Leo.

related.name: III. The Empress
related.teaser: The Empress is the flowering womb, rose of Venus, matrix of compassion and abundance.

related.name: Peridot
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Amber
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Hel
related.teaser: Hel embodies underworld, wealth, endings — under Saturn · Pluto; in Scorpio, Capricorn.

related.name: Osiris
related.teaser: Osiris embodies underworld, wealth, endings — under Saturn · Pluto; in Scorpio, Capricorn.
